title: Jounieh waterfront · Mount Lebanon

classification.label: coastal_construction
classification.reasoning: The before image shows a mostly undeveloped coastal area with minimal infrastructure, while the after image shows clear construction of what appears to be a pier, jetty, or coastal dock structure extending into the water, indicating significant coastal construction activity.

second_opinion.reason: The after image clearly shows a pier or jetty structure extending into the water that is absent in the before image, indicating genuine coastal construction rather than a seasonal or tidal artifact.

narration: Pulled before/after composites and aligned them (same-season, cloud-masked).

Classified as coastal_construction (confidence 0.85; claude). Second opinion: confirmed — The after image clearly shows a pier or jetty structure extending into the water that is absent in the before image, indicating genuine coastal construction rather than a seasonal or tidal artifact..
